rag_rules: AGREE validator diagnostics indicate unresolved identifiers in guarantee expressions; resolve by ensuring all referenced symbols are visible or declared in the same annex.
generic_rules: In AGREE contracts, all identifiers in guarantee expressions must be either visible AADL features or previously declared equation helpers within the same annex scope.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE guarantees must reference only symbols that are either component features or locally declared equation helpers in the same annex block.
anti_patterns: Avoid referencing undefined or non-visible identifiers in AGREE guarantee expressions; instead, declare required helpers or remove the invalid clause.
irrelevant_topics: Component type annexes vs implementation annexes
